synopsis: The Imperial Star Destroyer Liquidator is quickly approaching the Rebel base on Yavin Four. It is part of an Imperial plan to control hyperspace—and crush the Rebellion. To prevent the Empire from carrying out this evil deed, the Rebels must locate the Imperial forces without being discovered. Your mission: to stop the Liquidator…and get out of Yavin Four alive! May the Force be with you.
title: Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator
